# Autogenerated Code

Generated .NET classes for the GTFS Realtime Protobuf specification. See [gtfs-realtime-bindings](https://github.com/MobilityData/gtfs-realtime-bindings) and [GTFS Realtime Reference](https://gtfs.org/documentation/realtime/reference/) for details.

## Regenerating Bindings

1. Install [protogen](https://github.com/protobuf-net/protobuf-net)
2. Update the [`GtfsRealtime.proto`](./GtfsRealtime.proto) file from [here](https://gtfs.org/documentation/realtime/proto/).
3. `protogen GtfsRealtime.proto --csharp_out=.` (from the `CorvallisBus.Core/Generated` folder)
5. Edit the `TransitRealtime` namespace to be `CorvallisBus.Core.GtfsRealtimeGenerated` inside `GtfsRealtime.cs`.
